Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Steve Martin and Betty White catch a wave in the movie spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway breaks up Harvey in "The Dentist." Also: Carol looks to steal the show from a Broadway star.
Video.title: Ethel Merman, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guests John Davidson and Ross Martin appear in "The Helen Feibelbaum Story", a spoof of celebrity biopics.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Dick Martin is the town gigolo on "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a spoof of "Sunset Boulevard."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Pat Carroll and Jack Jones guest. Pat and Carol play competing actresses. Plus: "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Jack Jones

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Cass Elliot guests! Features a salute to Foreign Language films, and a sketch with puppies.
Video.title: Joel Grey, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Carol perform a number. The Smothers Brothers drop by, and "Carol & Sis" try astrology.
Video.title: Diahann Carroll, Smothers Brothers

Video.summary: Valerie Harper & Tim Conway guest! Valerie joins Carol on a date, and Tim is the world's oldest fireman.
Video.title: Valerie Harper, Tim Conway

Video.summary: The cast of "The Carol Burnett Show" revisits some of their favorite moments from the show.
Video.title: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Image.alt: The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers
The Carol Burnett Show: Show Stoppers

Video.summary: The Pointer Sisters are tonight's musical guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays an airport guard. Carol & Harvey play actors suffering Carol's lack of contact lenses.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: John Byner & Helen Reddy join Carol in a sketch about swingers. Also, The Family plays a game of "Sorry!"
Video.title: John Byner, Helen Reddy

Video.summary: Highlights Dick Van Dyke as a TV announcer who fills in when technical difficulties scuttle the movie.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Tim Conway star! Steve plays a talk show host, then solves a mystery in a spoof with Tim.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Sammy Davis Jr. stars, appearing as a star who returns to his hometown. Also: a look at a No-Frills Airline.
Video.title: Sammy Davis Jr.

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Nanette Fabray and Trini Lopez!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Trini Lopez, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Guests Tom Conway and Ken Berry visit Canoga Falls in "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a tribute to Vaudeville.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway contributes in sketches as the Lone Ranger and as a man who lives a dog's life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Video.summary: David Hartman & Paula Kelly star! Features Nora Desmond and George and Zelda. Also: "This Is Your Lifetime."
Video.title: David Hartman, Paula Kelly

Video.summary: Carol's guests are George Chakiris and Shirley Jones!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley Jones, George Chakiris

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence appear in commercial spoofs. Tim plays The Oldest Man and is in a pantomime.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: The Rat Pack meets The Burnett Bunch when Peter Lawford guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peter Lawford, Minnie Pearl

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his final season premiere! Also, new member Dick Van Dyke joins Tim for a pantomime.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters and Cass Elliot guest star in "As The Stomach Turns", and Lyle causes havoc and absurdity.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Cher stars! Includes Harvey and Tom as dueling pianists, commercial spoofs, and a love triangle.
Video.title: Cher

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join for a blockbuster tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry and Totie Fields drop by to take part in "Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields
